description: Set up GitHub Actions CI for the bl crate. Two workflows: (1) CI on PR + push to main runs cargo test + cargo publish --dry-run. (2) Publish workflow triggered by v* tags runs tests then cargo publish using CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN secret. (3) release-plz workflow on push to main opens Release PRs that bump Cargo.toml version + update CHANGELOG based on conventional commits; merging the Release PR auto-tags and triggers publish. Document the release flow in README.md. Note: CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN secret must be added to the GitHub repo by the user — flag this at review time.
title: Add release-plz + crates.io publish CI
